description: Lark (international: open.larksuite.com) and Feishu (China: open.feishu.cn) bot webhook URLs, app credentials, tenant access tokens, and tenant red flags.

token_patterns.name: Lark / Feishu App ID
token_patterns.notes: App IDs are not strictly secret but pair-match with the App Secret.

token_patterns.name: Lark / Feishu App Secret in code
Lark / Feishu Tenant Access Token in code
Lark / Feishu User Access Token in code

misconfigurations.title: Lark bot webhook configured without signature verification (`secret`)
misconfigurations.rationale: Bot webhook URLs can be enriched with a `secret` so the receiver verifies the `sign` field; without it any internet host can post.
misconfigurations.fix: In the bot setup, enable 'Signature verification' and verify `hmac_sha256(timestamp + '\n' + secret, '')` against the inbound `sign`.

misconfigurations.title: Custom app granted `im:message`, `contact:user.email:readonly`, and `docx.document:readonly` at once
misconfigurations.rationale: Combination is the exfil-bot shape on Lark/Feishu.
misconfigurations.fix: Open Platform > App > Permissions — request only what you call.

misconfigurations.title: Cross-tenant collaboration permitted by default
misconfigurations.rationale: Cross-tenant DMs / shared docs are exfil channels.
misconfigurations.fix: Admin Console > Security > Cross-tenant — restrict to allowlisted external tenants.

misconfigurations.title: Two-step verification not required for admins
misconfigurations.fix: Admin Console > Security > require two-step verification for admin groups.

admin_red_flags.title: Bulk export from Lark Docs / Sheets / Base by a non-admin
admin_red_flags.rationale: Document mass-export is a recurring exfil shape.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: docs.export events with count > 50 in 1h.

admin_red_flags.title: New custom app added with `im:resource` + `contact:user.*` + `vc:meeting`
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: app installed/upgraded with permission set matching watchlist.

admin_red_flags.title: Admin role granted to a non-IT account
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `admin_role_granted` outside the IT admin group.
